message:
fix(ad): remove dead code, use slice::from_ref, and fix clippy lints

Replace &[g.clone()] with std::slice::from_ref(g) in vjp_single,
scan_vjp, and test functions to avoid unnecessary clones. Remove dead
SVD VJP variables (v_t, v_vals, gv_vals). Use is_multiple_of(2) and
function references. Prefix unused params with underscore. Convert
vec![] to array literals where appropriate.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
